generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, I've always believed in strong alliances for our security. But have we considered the hidden costs? Recent reports show that excessive burden-sharing demands are straining our economy while our partners enjoy disproportionate benefits. It's time to demand fairer commitments that truly protect our interests. #NationalSecurity #AllianceFairness
